title: Create a SpiderIQ Tenant Page
summary: Create a new published page on a SpiderIQ tenant via the @spideriq/mcp-publish MCP server. Use whenever the user says 'create a page', 'add a page', 'new landing page', 'make a /pricing page', 'add an /about page', 'spin up a new section', or any page-creation request. Walks through reading the help reference, building the blocks[] payload with the correct shape (canonical block schema, no silent-accept anti-patterns), running the dry_run preview → confirm flow, publishing, applying a theme, and deploying to the Cloudflare edge.
